// reporters: FqnDecoyReporterDecl.java.txt#Reporter.report
package com.caller;

// Positive: no in-file decoy, so the FQN call matches the declared tier-2
// target (leak.own.Reporter.report) - clean.
class FqnTier2Positive {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            leak.own.Reporter.report(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
